code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i <= n
    mut ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        ws = is_ws(b)
      when None
        ws = true
      end
    end
    if ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut p = 0
  while p < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    p = p + 1
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      match used.get(j)
      when Some(u)
        if u == 0
          match xs.get(j)
          when Some(v)
            if best_idx < 0 or v > best_val
              best_idx = j
              best_val = v
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    mut new_used: List<Int> = []
    mut m = 0
    while m < n
      if m == best_idx
        new_used = list.push(new_used, 1)
      else
        match used.get(m)
        when Some(u)
          new_used = list.push(new_used, u)
        when None
          new_used = list.push(new_used, 0)
        end
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    used = new_used
    result = list.push(result, best_val)
    k = k + 1
  end
  result
end

mut nums_line = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  nums_line = l
when None
  nums_line = ""
end

mut k_line = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  k_line = l
when None
  k_line = ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(nums_line)
let k_opt = string.parse_int(string.trim(k_line))
mut k_val = 0
match k_opt
when Some(v)
  k_val = v
when None
  k_val = 0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let n_sorted = sorted.len()
let take = if k_val > n_sorted
  n_sorted
else
  k_val
end

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
